backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Printing Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users, delivery, etc.) and including storage, authorization, and access control mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that transforms the old actor state (with `quotationFileBlob` on quotation requests) into the new schema (with `designStatus`), preserving all other fields across upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their affected frontend/backend files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering hooks, pages, components, and contexts for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React SPA, setting the page title to 'Nellore Printing Hub' and mounting the React app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, customer portal, and admin pages), wraps the app in `CustomerAuthProvider`, and conditionally shows a `ProfileSetup` modal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts access to admin-only pages, showing loading, access-denied, or first-admin-registration UI based on authentication and admin status.
frontend/src/components/BilingualText.ts: Renders English and Telugu text together, either stacked vertically or inline side-by-side with a separator.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Mobile bottom navigation bar with tabs for main app routes, highlighting the active route and hidden on large screens.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: Modal bottom sheet component with backdrop, slide-up animation, optional title, close button, and scrollable content area.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: Form select input that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, triggering haptic feedback on selection.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget that displays a conversation thread for authenticated users and allows sending messages via a form with name/email fields.
frontend/src/components/CustomerGuard.ts: Route guard that redirects unauthenticated customers to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: Button that toggles the app language between English and Telugu with haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout with a sticky header (logo, desktop nav, language toggle, admin link, CTA button), main content area, footer, and mobile bottom nav.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Internet Identity login/logout button that handles authentication state, loading indicator, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling per sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog component for collecting and saving a user's name, email, and mobile number with validation, haptic feedback, and i18n support.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during the pull and refresh states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that triggers the native Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy to share the app's URL and description.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service card.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that attaches touch event listeners to enable horizontal swipe navigation with a visual translateX offset during swiping.
frontend/src/contexts/CustomerAuthContex: A React context that manages customer authentication sessions, persisting the session to localStorage and exposing login/logout methods.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context that manages the app's active language (English or Telugu), persists the choice to localStorage, and provides a translation lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to determine whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges, gating the query on actor and identity readiness.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin credentials by SHA-256 hashing the password and calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminContent.ts: Hooks for fetching and updating the admin-managed site content (contact info, services, hours, gallery, etc.) via React Query mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that checks whether any admin users exist in the backend by querying the admin user count, returning a boolean adminExists flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks to fetch admin invitations and invite new admin users, hashing passwords with SHA-256 before sending to the backend actor.
Provides hooks to register the first admin via Internet Identity principal and to seed the first admin's email/password credentials when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides hooks for biometric (WebAuthn) login and registration, checking device support and calling the backend actor to register biometric credentials.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides hooks for sending chat messages, fetching all messages, owner replies, and retrieving chat history for a specific customer.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the company logo via the backend actor, with query cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update contact information (email, phone, address, maps link) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQuotations: Provides a hook to fetch all quotation requests for a specific customer by their ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides hooks to get/set delivery configuration and calculate delivery fees based on distance via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to respond to a quotation negotiation, invalidating related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides hooks to get and set the office location via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on update.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides hooks to fetch, add, edit, and delete projects, with support for filtering by service category.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook using touch events, tracking pull distance and triggering a refresh callback when a threshold is exceeded.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a hook to fetch the reply file blob associated with a specific quotation ID via the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook to handle admin responses to quotation requests, updating status and optional message via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for CRUD operations on quotations, including fetching all/my quotations, getting details, creating, adding details, approving, and managing status transitions.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: React Query hook that fetches quotation statistics (counts by status) from the backend actor, refreshing every 30 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceImages.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting service images through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Custom hook that handles touch swipe gestures to navigate between a predefined set of pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoClips.ts: React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and deleting video clips through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties using OKLCH color values, plus utility classes for safe areas, scrollbar hiding, and animations.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wrapper class around the backend ExternalBlob type, providing methods to get bytes, get a direct URL, create from URL or bytes, and track upload progress.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying a hero section, a grid of company benefits with icons, and a commitment section, all using i18n translations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AboutContentMan: An admin-only page for editing and saving the About page's custom text content, loading existing content from the backend and updating it via the updateAdminContent hook.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard page displaying quotation statistics (draft, pending, completed, etc.) as stat cards and navigation links to various admin management sections, protected by AdminGuard.
Admin login page supporting email/password, biometric, and Internet Identity authentication methods, with auto-seeding of initial admin credentials if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Admin registration page with a form for creating a new admin account, including email and password validation, using the useInviteAdminUser hook to submit credentials.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin user management page that lists existing admin users and provides a dialog form to invite new admin users with email and password, protected by AdminGuard.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BusinessHoursMa: Admin page for managing business hours per day of the week, allowing open/close time edits or marking days as closed, with save functionality via useUpdateAdminContent.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page for viewing and responding to customer chat messages, grouping them by customer email with expandable conversation threads and reply functionality.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin page for editing and saving business contact details (email, phone, address, maps link) using admin content hooks with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin page for configuring delivery pricing, allowing the admin to set per-km rate and minimum fee (stored in paise, displayed in rupees) with bilingual support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HomepageContent: Admin page for editing and saving the homepage promotional/announcement text content, with bilingual (English/Telugu) UI and a textarea editor.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and managing the company logo, supporting file selection, upload progress tracking, and displaying the current logo.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads, category selection, and an add/edit dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for viewing and managing all customer quotations, with expandable cards showing quotation details, status badges, and actions to mark as customer-pending or accept payment.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ServiceMediaMan: Admin page for managing service images and video clips, allowing admins to add or delete media items organized by service type via tabbed UI.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Renders a contact page with business info (phone, email, address) fetched from the backend and a message form that submits via the actor's sendMessage method.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerLogi: Customer login page that authenticates users via email/mobile and SHA-256-hashed password against the backend actor, then redirects to the customer portal.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerPort: Customer portal dashboard displaying the logged-in customer's quotations with status badges, progress indicators, and a logout option.
frontend/src/pages/customer/CustomerRegi: Customer registration page that collects email, mobile, and password, hashes the password with SHA-256, and registers the customer via the backend actor before redirecting to login.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Displays delivery pricing config (per-km rate, minimum fee) and provides an interactive calculator that estimates delivery fees based on user-entered distance.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights, service category cards, and print sample images with navigation CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Lists the authenticated customer's quotation requests with status badges, expandable detail sections (price, description, reply files), and an approve action.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Masonry-style gallery of completed projects with category filter buttons and a detail modal, fetching project data from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Success confirmation page shown after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps with navigation buttons.
A form page where customers submit printing quotation requests, collecting service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and design status, then navigating to a confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays a customer's quotation list with status badges, allowing them to accept, reject, negotiate price, or approve payment for each quotation, with a negotiation history dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A marketing page listing four printing services (digital, banner, offset, design) with features, sample images, and a call-to-action button linking to the quotation request page.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: A form page for authenticated customers to submit a star-rated review with name, text, project type, and optional image upload, saving it via the addReview hook.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays all customer reviews in a filterable grid by star rating, with pull-to-refresh support and a button to navigate to the review submission page; requires authentication to view.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: Defines the full English translation strings for the Nellore Printing Hub app, covering navigation, services, quotation forms, statuses, customer portal, and more.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Exports English and Telugu translation objects and provides a `getTranslations` helper that returns the appropriate translation record based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Defines the full Telugu translation strings mirroring the English translation keys for the Nellore Printing Hub app.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Provides haptic feedback utilities using the browser Vibration API, with named patterns for tap, success, error, and selection events.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: Provides WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering and authenticating credentials, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for 'Nellore Printing Hub', documenting existing features, architectural notes, image requirements, and known issues for a bilingual printing web app sponsored by Magic Advertising.
